category_sources: source_facts.description says it is an RTF-to-other-formats converter; GNU UnRTF page describes conversion from RTF to HTML, LaTeX, troff macros, and RTF.
display_name_sources: Official GNU page title is UnRTF; source_facts.name is unrtf.
docs_sources: Official GNU project page is the best documentation surface and includes introduction, downloading, and bug reporting information.
repo_sources: Official GNU UnRTF page links the Mercurial repository at hg.savannah.gnu.org; source_facts.repo is empty so repo was researched.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists unrtf; source_facts.description and GNU page identify RTF conversion; source_facts.homepage is GNU.
